# RoommateGroups — llms.txt

> RoommateGroups is a free US roommate-finding platform covering 65+ cities.

## What this site does
- Helps people find compatible roommates and housing communities
- Allows users to post and browse room listings by city
- Provides lifestyle-based matching filters (budget, schedule, pets, etc.)

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://roommategroups.com/
- Search listings: https://roommategroups.com/search
- City directory: https://roommategroups.com/cities
- Post a listing: https://roommategroups.com/dashboard

## Contact
- Email: hello@roommategroups.com
- Social: facebook.com/Roommategroups | instagram.com/roommategroups

## Do not crawl
- /dashboard (requires login)
- /admin
- /api/
